note: Registry the watcher diffs the live Topps calendar against. 'built' = we have a page (maps topps slug -> our /slug). 'skip' = intentionally not covering (with reason). Anything on the calendar not in either list is reported as NEW.

skip.complete-sets-baseball: Factory/complete set — retail-oriented, minimal hobby chase or auto content
skip.topps-chrome-disney: Entertainment/licensed comic — off-niche for our sports+Pokemon audience
skip.topps-chrome-uwcl: Women's UCL soccer — covered under World Cup soccer angle only if it trends
skip.topps-finest-ucc: European club soccer — low priority vs US sports
skip.topps-pristine-premier-league: European club soccer — low priority vs US sports
skip.topps-chrome-baseball-logofractor-editio: Online-exclusive variant of Chrome Baseball — covered by /topps-chrome-baseball-2026
